ActorFrame.children: <Layer File="@'maggot'..Pallette()..'.sprite'" InitCommand="zoom,.64;x,SCREEN_CENTER_X-105;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y+30;rotationz,90;queuecommand,Register" RegisterCommand="%function(self) Register(self,-10,-13,6,13,5) self:sleep(.1) self:queuecommand('Move1') end" Move1Command="%function(self) self:rotationx(180) Move(self,0,.03,0,-G,'Dy','>',370,2) end" Move2Command="%function(self) self:rotationx(0) Move(self,0,-.03,0,-G,'Dy','<',250,1) end" MoveCommand="%function(self) Update(self) end" /> <Layer File="@'maggot'..Pallette()..'.sprite'" InitCommand="zoom,.64;x,SCREEN_CENTER_X+105;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y+76;rotationy,180;rotationz,90;queuecommand,Register" RegisterCommand="%function(self) Register(self,-6,-13,10,13,5) self:sleep(.1) self:queuecommand('Move2') end" Move1Command="%function(self) self:rotationx(180) Move(self,0,.03,0,-G,'Dy','>',370,2) end" Move2Command="%function(self) self:rotationx(0) Move(self,0,-.03,0,-G,'Dy','<',250,1) end" MoveCommand="%function(self) Update(self) end" />
